subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, from the realms of meaning and utterance, befitteth and beseemeth the Beloved of all possibility, through His blessed Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از عوالم معانی و بیان محبوب امکان را لایق و سزا است که باسم مبارکش
subcodes.subjects: @consultation, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @suffering and imprisonment, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat]
